context.role: Displays game over message, final score, high score, and restart instructions
context.screen_position: center of screen (x=300px, y=75px), multiple text elements vertically stacked
context.usage_scenario: Appears immediately when player collides with obstacle, remains until player presses Space to restart

animation.description: Static text display. Optional: 'Press SPACE to restart' blinks at 0.5-second intervals

visual_specification.details: Line 1: 'GAME OVER' (24px, y=-30px offset). Line 2: 'Score: XXXXX' (16px, y=0px). Line 3: 'HI XXXXX' (16px, y=+20px). Line 4: 'Press SPACE to restart' (12px, y=+50px). All center-aligned at x=300px

relationships.shared_with: Uses same font style as score_display, same 5-digit zero-padded format for scores
relationships.differences_from: score_display is 16px right-aligned, game_over_screen has multiple sizes (24px, 16px, 12px) center-aligned
